pr.title: [WIP] Refactor runtime modules and slim main.py
pr.body:
- [x] Inspect current runtime modules, shims, and affected tests
- [x] Run existing lint/test commands to establish the pre-change baseline
- [x] Move runtime config/orchestrator imports to core.runtime shims and slim main.py dispatch
- [x] Update batch processing and tests for run_generate/core.runtime paths
- [ ] Run targeted validation, then full non-integration test suite and security check
pr.author: Copilot
